canonical_action: batch relay writes into larger fixed-size batches before flushing to the downstream event bus, to cut per-write I/O overhead
closure_reason: the added buffering latency from larger batches pushed p99 delivery latency past the SLA during traffic spikes
measured_outcome: cut per-write syscalls by about 35% in a load test, but p99 delivery latency during spike traffic rose from about 80ms to over 900ms, breaching the 500ms SLA; rolled back after a week in staging
